case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. VIDAL JESUS GALERA SOSA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF OPORTU, INC. RE : RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO COLLECTIONS AGENT. DEFENDANT JESUS GALERA SOSA DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOSA, VIDAL JESUS GALERA $680.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $785.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

TRIAL RESET TO DEC-11-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-30-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
